response_draft_not_posted: I prepared a small patch for the system command stdout maxBuffer issue. It adds a configurable Output buffer limit setting, stores it as command_max_buffer in MB with a 10 MB default, passes maxBuffer into child_process.exec, documents the new setting, and adds settings coverage. A local Node smoke test reproduces the default stdout maxBuffer failure at 1.1 MB and confirms the same command succeeds with a larger maxBuffer. I can hand over the patch or adapt it to your branch after fixed-scope acceptance and external payment proof.
